import React from "react"; import { FileText, Star, Check, Calendar } from "lucide-react"; const Dashboard = ({ articles, categories, getStatusColor }) => { const stats = { total: articles.length, shortlisted: articles.filter(a => a.status === "shortlisted").length, final: articles.filter(a => a.status === "final").length, }; return (

Total Articles

{stats.total}

Shortlisted

{stats.shortlisted}

Final Selection

{stats.final}

Next Deck Due

July 31

Recent Activity

{articles.map(article => (

{article.title}

{article.source} • {article.date}

{article.status}
))}
); }; export default Dashboard;
